response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional depth in full-stack development with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, testing) and extensive experience in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms, and architecture — plus a 25+ year track record of shipping complex systems. His open-source contributions and teaching background signal strong collaboration and craftsmanship. The only concerns are the unusually long and fragmented employment timeline and lack of explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, though his experience implies adaptability.
strengths: 25+ years of full-stack experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in AI-agent systems and developer tooling, directly matching key requirement
Strong open-source contributions, testing rigor, and DevOps/CI/CD infrastructure experience
concerns: Employment history spans 25+ years with overlapping dates and unclear progression
No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though equivalent experience likely exists
German language skill is only basic, may limit collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise team
